questionHtml: Use the graph to show that the nuclear radius of silicon-30 is about 4 fm.
markschemeHtml:
read off between 17 and 19 «deg» ✔

correct use of d =  λ sin ⁡ θ = 7.8 × 10−15 «m» ✔

so radius = 7.8 2 «fm» = 3.9 «fm» ✔

Award ecf for wrong angle in MP1.

Answer for MP3 must show at least 2 sf.

meta.title: Use the graph to show that the nuclear radius of silicon-30 is about 4 fm.
